data.title: Ray Dalio's Bridgewater Adds Broadcom, Apple, SMCI In Q3, While Offloading Stake In AI Giant Nvidia And Other Big Tech Companies
data.description: Bridgewater Associates, the world's biggest hedge fund, sold top AI-linked stocks like Nvidia, Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, and Johnson & Johnson.

data.title: Shiba Inu Burn Rate Explodes By 3,450%: Is SHIB Price Going Up 72% In December Again?
data.description: Shiba Inu's (CRYPTO: SHIB) 72% monthly gain and its active coin-burning mechanism continue to fuel optimism among traders.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Why Bitcoin Cannot Crack $100,000 Just Yet
data.description: Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) struggle to cross the $100,000 mark is due to profit-taking, derivatives data and historical trends, analysts tell Benzinga.

data.title: US Stock Futures Dip As Dollar Slides And Treasuries Rise After S&P Hits 54th All-Time High This Year: Analyst Sees 'Further Upside' Of Around 10% In 2025 From Current Levels
data.description: U.S. stock futures were in negative territory during Tuesday’s premarket hours as the dollar slipped to 106.3 level.

data.title: Apple's Foldable iPhone Could Spark Smartphone Market Revival In 2026, Says Expert
data.description: Apple's reported plans to launch a foldable iPhone in 2026 could breathe new life into the foldable smartphone market.
